popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SCOTTISH%20NOBILITY.htm#EllenMarMJohnMenteith as of 12/9/2018

GRATNEY (-before Sep 1305).  He succeeded his father in 1297 as Earl of Mar.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gratney Mac Domhnaill於1250年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米時，他的父親Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar7歲，母親Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'20歲。他和Lady Christina De Brus至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1305年9月在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gratney Mac Domhnaill于1250年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米时，他的父亲Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar7岁，母亲Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'20岁。他和Lady Christina De Brus至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1305年9月在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gratney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably English: unexplained. This surname is most common in TX and LA. It is found mainly among African Americans.

en.lifeSummary: When Gratney Mac Domhnaill was born in 1250, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, was 7 and his mother, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', was 20. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Lady Christina De Brus. He died in September 1305, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gratney Mac Domhnaill est né en 1250, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, avait 7 ans et sa mère, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Lady Christina De Brus. Il est décédé en septembre 1305, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gratney Mac Domhnaill 1250 in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar 7 und seine Mutter Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' 20. Er hatte mit Lady Christina De Brus mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb im September 1305 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gratney Mac Domhnaill è nato il nel 1250 nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, aveva 7 anni e il suo madre, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Lady Christina De Brus. Morì nel settembre 1305, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Gratney Mac Domhnaillが1250年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーで生まれた時，父Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Marは7歳，母Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'は20歳であった。彼はLady Christina De Brusとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1305年9月に故郷で55歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gratney Mac Domhnaill(이)가 1250년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar(은)는 7세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Lady Christina De Brus(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 9월 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gratney Mac Domhnaill nasceu em 1250, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, tinha 7 anos e sua mãe, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Lady Christina De Brus. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1305, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gratney Mac Domhnaill родился в 1250 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar было 7 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Lady Christina De Brus. Он умер сентябрь 1305 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gratney Mac Domhnaill nació en 1250, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, tenía 7 años y su mamá, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Lady Christina De Brus. Murió en septiembre de 1305, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
